exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your birdwatching forward
items: Research and purchase essential field equipment: binoculars (8x42 recommended), field notebook, and bird identification guide for your region
Create a portable field kit by organizing your equipment in a lightweight backpack with quick-access pockets for binoculars, notepad, and pen
Test and adjust your binoculars by practicing focus and diopter settings on stationary objects at various distances
Set up a weatherproof storage system for your field equipment including lens cleaning supplies and emergency backup batteries
Download and set up a bird identification app with offline maps and call recordings for your target birding locations
Practice using your field equipment as a complete system by conducting a 30-minute mock birding session in your backyard or local park
